title: Ennai Pandhada Song Lyrics Ullam Ketkumae
stanzas:
Senguyile.. siruveyile.
mannil illa valam
enna enna vendru
seyarkai kol ariyum
penne

unnil illa valam
ennadhenna ena
ullangai ariyum kanne

nee azhagin moththam
endra sollu.
andha brahman vaitha
muttru pulli.

Iniyavane.. ilaiyavane
unnai kaanvillai
ennum podhum nenjil
chinna paithiyangal
pudikkum.

hoi panju meththaigalil
thookkam illai endru
parkal thalaiyanaiyai
kadikkum.

unai thottu paarka
manam thudikkum.
nenjil vittu vittu
vedi vedikkum.

Chinnavane..
ennavane....
mookku mookku vaithu
netri mutti vida vaadaa.

ennai kondaada
pirandhavane.
idhayam rendaaga
pilarndhavane.
osai illaamal
nulaindhavane.
uyirai kan kondu
kadaindhavane.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ennai Pandhada'?

The song 'Ennai Pandhada' expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Ullam Ketkumae'?

'Ullam Ketkumae' revolves around the complexities of love and relationships, showcasing how emotions intertwine in the journey of life.

Who are the singers of 'Ennai Pandhada'?

The song features the melodious voices of Srimathumitha and Srinivas, who bring the lyrics to life with their captivating performances.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics for 'Ennai Pandhada' were penned by the renowned lyricist Vairamuthu, known for his poetic expressions in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Ennai Pandhada' released?

'Ennai Pandhada' was released on June 3, 2005, and has since become a beloved romantic track.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Ullam Ketkumae, the song Ennai Pandhada beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and yearning. The duet by Srimathumitha and Srinivas conveys a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The lyrics, crafted by Vairamuthu, delve into the complexities of love, evoking feelings of both joy and sadness. This melodious track resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennai Pandhada from the Ullam Ketkumae movie is a beautiful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Srimathumitha and Srinivas, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with the heart. The lyrical brilliance of Vairamuthu adds depth to this melodious track, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: I was born to be yours. My heart was born as two.
Without a voice, it blossomed and took life, capturing the soul.
When I saw you, I fell for this world. Will time always allow love?
I was born to be yours. My heart was born as two.
Without a voice, it blossomed and took life, capturing the soul.
In the red light... in the small light. The world doesn't know what I want, oh girl.
What is my worth without you, oh beautiful one?
You are the total beauty, like a pearl in the ocean.
In the red light... in the small light. I opened my mouth and asked for life, dear.
Oh dear one... oh young one, I can't see you, but my heart is filled with small madness.
There is no rest in the soft cotton, they say it will hurt the head.
Seeing you makes my heart race. Inside, it burns and burns.
Oh little one... oh my one... don't let go of the nose ring that you have.
I was born to be yours. My heart was born as two. Without a voice, it blossomed and took life, capturing the soul.
